text: #NACHO #TACO #OOTT #OilCrisis
quoted_text:
BREAKING: Iran directly rejects Trump's claim of Iran reaching out for new talks, calling it "fake news" and saying "Ignore Trump and Axios. There will be no talks until the Trump regime follows through on its commitments," per senior negotiating member Marandi.

Another source close to Iran's negotiating team calls all reports claiming new talks "false and unfounded," per Fars.
